allow:
Bash(cd "/Users/jack/Projects - Xcode/mypasswordchecker" && git add public/css/styles.css public/index.html public/password-api.html public/premium.html public/pricing.html "Docs/MyPasswordChecker sale till March 30, 2026.txt" && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Launch promo: premium tools FREE + 50% off all API tiers through March 31, 2026

- Add promo banners with countdown to index, premium, pricing, and API pages
- Bypass $1 paywall on premium.html during promo period \(free access\)
- Show 50% off API prices with strikethrough original prices on pricing + API pages
- Add promo CSS styles \(banner, badges, countdown, animations\)
- All changes auto-revert after April 1, 2026 via client-side date checks
- Include grandfathering FAQ for early API subscribers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(cd "/Users/jack/Projects - Xcode/mypasswordchecker" && npx wrangler pages project list 2>&1 && echo "===" && npx wrangler deployments list 2>&1 | head -20)
Bash(cd "/Users/jack/Projects - Xcode/mypasswordchecker" && npx wrangler pages project create mypasswordchecker-main --production-branch main 2>&1)
Bash(cd "/Users/jack/Projects - Xcode/mypasswordchecker" && npx wrangler pages deploy public --project-name=mypasswordchecker-main --commit-dirty=true 2>&1)

Bash(curl -sL https://7c66c57b.mypasswordchecker-main.pages.dev/ | grep -A2 "promo-banner" | head -5 && echo "---" && curl -sL https://7c66c57b.mypasswordchecker-main.pages.dev/ | grep "Try Premium Tools" | head -3)
Bash(cd "/Users/jack/Projects - Xcode/mypasswordchecker" && npx wrangler pages project delete mypasswordchecker-main --yes 2>&1)

Bash(cd "/Users/jack/Projects - Xcode/mypasswordchecker" && git add workers/mypasswordchecker-api.js wrangler-static.toml wrangler.toml && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Enforce domain verification for all API tiers and fix wrangler.toml

- Move domain verification check from Free tier only to all tiers \(0-6\) to prevent phishing abuse
- Fix wrangler.toml entry point from non-existent api-d1.js to mypasswordchecker-api.js
- Fix KV namespace IDs to match actual Cloudflare account namespaces
- Remove temporary wrangler-static.toml deployment config

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
